decision.question: Keep the bootstrap prompt aligned with the real loop, canonical sync ownership, and repo-truth shell so future agents do not rebuild stale behavior.
decision.chosen: Updated the prompt to describe canonical sync, repo-truth routing, projection state, and serialized git safety as the current system contract.
decision.rationale: Prompt sections drifted from the real runtime, which caused agents to recreate deleted surfaces and misread how task promotion worked.

outcome.result: Derived steering backfill captured from the March 28 collaboration thread.
outcome.lesson: The prompt is part of the runtime contract and must evolve with the system.
outcome.follow_up: Use this correction family to weight future orchestration, frontend, and verifier decisions more heavily.
